top_signals.title: Poland Holds Interest Rates as Inflationary Pressures Cool
top_signals.summary: Poland’s central bank kept borrowing costs unchanged for a third month after an unexpected drop in the inflation rate reduced pressure to tighten policy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: UniCredit Says Commerzbank Offer to Push Direct Stake to 34%
top_signals.summary: UniCredit SpA’s €38.6 billion ($45 billion) takeover offer for Commerzbank AG has been accepted by enough investors to push the stake over 30% once it takes ownership of the shares.

top_signals.title: Patagonia faces PR backlash over trademark lawsuit with drag queen
top_signals.summary: Patagonia is in hot water over its legal action against a drag queen, but as lawyers suggest, businesses face a double-edged sword when it comes to protecting their trademarks. A drag queen artist and environmentalist Wyn Wiley was sued by the US outdoor retailer Patagonia, which alleged the performer violated its trademark by going professionally [...]

top_signals.summary: The Republic of the Marshall Islands (RMI) Registry recognized several milestones and achievements during Posidonia, highlighting the collaboration and teamwork to make them possible.
